notes: ML classifier trained on 515 BSLDict multi-signer videos (avg 4.3 per sign), tested on original 119 test videos. Same MLP architecture (256→128→64) but with real signer variance instead of only synthetic augmentation. 20 augmentations per sample (down from 100). Features extracted using Python MediaPipe. CV accuracy 99.7% Top-1, 100% Top-5.
changes: BSLDict training data: 515 videos from signbsl.com covering all 119 signs
Multi-signer variance: average 4.3 different signers per sign (range 1-9)
Reduced augmentation from 100x to 20x (real variance replaces synthetic)
Train/test split: BSLDict videos for training, original 119 test videos for evaluation
No data leakage: training and test sets are completely independent

failDetails.HOSPITAL: predicted MORE (19%) — only 1 BSLDict training video
failDetails.STAND: predicted BLUE (15%) — only 1 BSLDict training video

comparedToV14.note: 7.3x accuracy improvement (11.8% → 86.6%). Multi-signer training data was the key missing ingredient.
